AT LEAST DOZEN ROADS FLOODED IN TOWN OF CICERO WITH BETWEEN 1-3 FT OF WATER. FIRE DEPT CALLS STARTED BY 930PM... CONTINUED THROUGH EVENING.

*** 1 FATAL *** FLASH FLOODING OCCURRED IN THE CITY OF SYRACUSE BETWEEN 10 PM AND 11 PM. A PROBABLE FATALITY OCCURRED ON EAST FAYETTE STREET AROUND 1015 PM. WITNESSES REPORTED A MAN BEING SWEPT INTO A MANHOLE. RESCUERS HAVE BEEN UNABLE TO RECOVER A BODY AS OF JULY 2ND BUT THE PERSON IS ASSUMED TO BE DECEASED.
